single_next_goal: Run one bounded no-fixture supervised live AFK session-trigger proof from the accepted metadata-promotion source and report whether provider acceptance now closes with verified cleanup.
clipboard_prompt: follow the transfer packet in packets/to-operator-afk-dev-session-trigger-provider-acceptance-live-proof-v1.json; start from foreman/afk-provider-acceptance-live-proof-v1
required_evidence: Trigger exit code and receipt field summary
Provider acceptance observed/unobserved classification from live snapshot or promoted Codex metadata
Codex adapter status and bounded metadata refs when metadata closes the gate
Cleanup proof and post-run process comparison
Bounded provider metadata file summary without transcript bodies
Confirmation that async result routing was not started
pass_condition: input_submission submitted, provider_acceptance.status=provider_session_observed, concrete provider_session_id, cleanup.status=verified, status=completed, and no provider_acceptance_unobserved or provider_session_id_not_observed mismatch
stop_conditions: worktree is dirty before the run
the trigger requires fixtures, dry-run hooks, final session command spelling, or async result routing
provider transcript body inspection becomes necessary
human_notes: This is the live evidence gate after accepted deterministic prompt submission and metadata provider acceptance promotion.
Do not start async result routing yet.
